sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n18864" key="a)yeudo/mantis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀψευδόμαντις</orth>, <sense id="n18864.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of no false diviner,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τέχνη</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Nicoch.</author> </bibl> </cit> ap. <title_ TEIform="title">Lex.Sabb.</title_> </sense> </entryFree>
